name: performance.bandit_one_site_remembered_lead_wait_30m
description: Performance-audit row: one active hostile overmap AI site. A bandit camp starts from a persisted remembered camp-map lead, waits through the real 30-minute overmap AI cadence, and captures compact live-path timing/counter lines from bandit_live_world perf instrumentation.

steps.label: post_load_one_site_perf_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the one-site performance fixture; this is startup/load plus fixture footing only

steps.label: preflight_one_site_remembered_lead_perf_fixture
steps.abort_reason: preflight saved bandit_live_world site did not contain the persisted remembered camp-map lead needed for the one-site performance row
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved bandit_live_world contains one inactive bandit camp with a scout-confirmed remembered lead before the measured live cadence starts
steps.failure_rule: If the remembered lead is missing or malformed, later timing cannot be credited to the intended one-site performance row.

steps.label: measure_30_minutes_one_site_remembered_lead
steps.pre_menu_expected_visible_fact: alarm/wait mode menu is visible, then Wait a while is chosen before the duration menu
steps.expected_visible_fact: the player waited through a bounded 30-minute overmap AI cadence window; performance credit depends on same-run perf/debug artifact lines, not the wait UI alone
steps.failure_rule: If the wait is interrupted or the artifact delta lacks the perf/cadence lines, this row is inconclusive.

steps.label: audit_one_site_perf_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not contain compact perf counters and the expected remembered-lead dispatch cadence line
steps.failure_rule: No one-site performance row credit if the same-run artifact lacks the perf counter line and the dispatch line that identify the measured job mix.

evidence_contract.claim: one active bandit-camp remembered-lead hostile overmap AI can advance through a real 30-minute live cadence while emitting compact timing/counter evidence
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for performance
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No performance-row credit if startup/load, fixture preflight, bounded wait/cadence action, same-run perf counter line, and job-identifying dispatch artifact are not all present and classified separately.
